metadata.name: confidential_batcher
metadata.description: Confidential batcher: aggregates encrypted deposits and reveals only each batch's total to a public share-mint vault

docs: Anchor entrypoint module for the confidential batcher.

instructions.name: claim
docs: Claims a user's confidential payout from a settled batch: one MulDiv
eval frame — the exact proportional floor
`encrypted(joined) x payout_received / total_joined` — then a
confidential transfer of the resulting handle to the user's payout
account. Permissionless pull — anyone can trigger a user's claim.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays the claim lineage and transfer output rent. Anyone.

accounts.name: user
docs: seeds. Not a signer — claims are permissionless pulls.

accounts.name: batcher
docs: Batcher config.

accounts.name: batch
docs: The settled batch being claimed from.

accounts.name: batch_authority
docs: authority and the payout transfer's authority via invoke_signed.

accounts.name: join_record
docs: The user's join record; marked claimed here.

accounts.name: claim_amount_value
docs: the transfer amount.

accounts.name: payout_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint claims pay out in.

accounts.name: batch_payout_token_account
docs: validated by the token CPI and pinned below.

accounts.name: user_payout_token_account
docs: must already exist — the user initializes it once. Validated by the
token CPI and pinned below.

accounts.name: batch_payout_transferred_value
docs: the token CPI.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program (FHE compute + ACL).

accounts.name: confidential_token_program
docs: confidential-token program composed via CPI.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for account creation.

instructions.name: dispatch
docs: Dispatches the batch once it is old enough: burns the batch account's
full encrypted balance via `confidential_burn_from_value` and records
the born-public burned handle the KMS will certify. Permissionless.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays the burn's output ACL rent. Anyone.

accounts.name: batcher
docs: Batcher config carrying the minimum batch age.

accounts.name: batch
docs: The pending batch being dispatched.

accounts.name: join_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint whose encrypted total supply the burn decreases.

accounts.name: batch_join_token_account
docs: token CPI and pinned below.

accounts.name: batch_balance_value
docs: superseded as the burn's balance output (the whole-balance alias).

accounts.name: batch_burned_amount_value
docs: decryptable; created by the token CPI (first and only burn per batch).

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program (FHE compute + ACL).

accounts.name: confidential_token_program
docs: confidential-token program composed via CPI.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for ACL account creation.

instructions.name: initialize_batcher
docs: Creates a batcher config for one direction, wiring a join confidential
mint, a payout confidential mint, and one public vault together.
Deposit batchers join with confidential underlying and pay confidential
shares; redeem batchers join with confidential shares and pay
confidential underlying. Permissionless one-time setup; the batcher
holds no admin role afterwards.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Rent payer and the account that submits the initialization.

accounts.name: batcher
docs: Batcher config account, created here. A fresh keypair signs its own
creation (the demo-vault `Vault` pattern).

accounts.name: join_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint users join batches with.

accounts.name: payout_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint claims pay out in.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Public vault the batcher fronts.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for account creation.

instructions.name: join
docs: Joins the pending batch with the batcher's join token: one user-signed
transaction that CPIs the coprocessor-attested confidential transfer
into the batch's own token account, then re-materializes the
transferred amount into the user's joined lineage (audience: user +
batch authority) in the same transaction. Repeated joins accumulate.

accounts.name: user
docs: Joining user; transfer authority over their confidential balance.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays join-record rent, transfer output rent, and the batcher eval's
ACL rent.

accounts.name: batcher
docs: Batcher config.

accounts.name: batch
docs: The pending batch being joined.

accounts.name: batch_authority
docs: batcher eval's compute subject + app authority.

accounts.name: join_record
docs: The user's join record for this batch; created on first join.

accounts.name: join_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint users join batches with.

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: by the token CPI.

accounts.name: batch_join_token_account
docs: validated by the token CPI and pinned below.

accounts.name: user_transferred_value
docs: token CPI, then read as the batcher eval's operand.

accounts.name: pending_join_value
docs: (accumulated) on repeat joins by the batcher eval.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program (FHE compute + ACL).

accounts.name: confidential_token_program
docs: confidential-token program composed via CPI.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for account creation.

instructions.name: open_batch
docs: Opens the next batch: creates the `Batch` account, its per-batch
authority PDA, its own confidential join and payout token accounts,
and its plain SPL accounts for settle's legs. Permissionless; requires
the previous batch of the same batcher to have been dispatched (a
batcher's batches never overlap while pending; the other direction's
batcher is independent). `authority_funding_lamports` is moved from
the payer to the batch authority PDA, which pays the rent the token
CPIs charge to the account owner. Unspent funding stays on the PDA and
is unrecoverable by design in this PoC (no sweep instruction).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays batch-account rent and the batch authority funding.

accounts.name: batcher
docs: Batcher config; `next_batch_index` advances.

accounts.name: previous_batch
docs: The immediately preceding batch; required except for the first open.
A new batch may not open while it is still pending.

accounts.name: batch
docs: The batch, at the batcher's next index.

accounts.name: batch_authority
docs: the batch's FHE evals and token CPIs, and pays owner-charged rent from
the funding it receives here.

accounts.name: join_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint users join batches with.

accounts.name: payout_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint claims pay out in.

accounts.name: join_underlying_mint
docs: SPL mint the join confidential mint wraps (vault underlying for deposit
batchers, vault shares for redeem batchers).

accounts.name: payout_underlying_mint
docs: SPL mint the payout confidential mint wraps (vault shares for deposit
batchers, vault underlying for redeem batchers).

accounts.name: batch_join_underlying
docs: Batch's plain SPL account receiving the redeemed batch total at settle.

accounts.name: batch_payout_underlying
docs: Batch's plain SPL account receiving the vault leg's output at settle.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program (FHE compute + ACL).

accounts.name: confidential_token_program
docs: confidential-token program composed via CPI.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL token program.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for account creation.

instructions.name: quit
docs: Leaves the pending batch before dispatch: transfers the user's exact
recorded amount back from the batch account (all-or-nothing) and
resets the joined lineage to zero. Always available while pending;
there is no exit between dispatch and settle (fhevm-internal#1773).

accounts.name: user
docs: Quitting user; owner of the refund destination.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays the transfer output rent and the reset eval's ACL rent.

accounts.name: batcher
docs: Batcher config.

accounts.name: batch
docs: The pending batch being quit.

accounts.name: batch_authority
docs: the reset eval's compute subject + app authority.

accounts.name: join_record
docs: The user's join record for this batch.

accounts.name: join_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint users join batches with.

accounts.name: batch_join_token_account
docs: validated by the token CPI and pinned below.

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: validated by the token CPI.

accounts.name: batch_transferred_value
docs: a transfer FROM the batch account); superseded by the token CPI.

accounts.name: pending_join_value
docs: amount, then reset to an encrypted zero by the batcher eval.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program (FHE compute + ACL).

accounts.name: confidential_token_program
docs: confidential-token program composed via CPI.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for account creation.

instructions.name: settle
docs: Settles a dispatched batch with the KMS certificate for its burned
total: redeems the plain tokens, moves them through the vault
(deposit for deposit batchers, withdraw for redeem batchers), wraps
the received payout into confidential payout tokens, and records the
batch's informational public rate. A zero-total batch is canceled
instead. Permissionless.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays the batch authority funding. Anyone.

accounts.name: batcher
docs: Batcher config (carries the direction).

accounts.name: batch
docs: The dispatched batch being settled.

accounts.name: batch_authority
docs: depositor/withdrawer, and wrap owner via invoke_signed. Receives
funding for the rent the redeem marker and wrap eval charge to the
owner.

accounts.name: join_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint the batch total was burned on.

accounts.name: join_underlying_mint
docs: SPL mint the join confidential mint wraps (vault underlying for deposit
batchers, vault shares for redeem batchers). Mutable because it is the
vault share mint on the redeem direction (leg 2 burns from it).

accounts.name: join_mint_vault_underlying
docs: by the token CPI.

accounts.name: batch_join_underlying
docs: Batch's plain SPL account receiving the redeemed batch total.

accounts.name: kms_context
docs: verifier CPI.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Public vault the batcher fronts.

accounts.name: batch_payout_underlying
docs: Batch's plain SPL account receiving the vault leg's output.

accounts.name: payout_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint claims pay out in.

accounts.name: payout_underlying_mint
docs: SPL mint the payout confidential mint wraps (vault shares for deposit
batchers, vault underlying for redeem batchers). Mutable because it is
the vault share mint on the deposit direction (leg 2 mints to it).

accounts.name: payout_mint_vault_underlying
docs: by the token CPI.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program (FHE compute + ACL).

accounts.name: confidential_token_program
docs: confidential-token program composed via CPI.

accounts.name: demo_vault_program
docs: demo-vault program composed via CPI.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL token program.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for account creation.

errors.name: DepositMintVaultMismatch
errors.msg: deposit confidential mint does not wrap the vault underlying mint

errors.name: SharesMintVaultMismatch
errors.msg: shares confidential mint does not wrap the vault share mint

errors.name: ConfidentialMintMismatch
errors.msg: confidential mint does not match the batcher config

errors.name: VaultMismatch
errors.msg: vault does not match the batcher config

errors.name: BatchBatcherMismatch
errors.msg: batch does not belong to this batcher

errors.name: PreviousBatchMismatch
errors.msg: previous batch account missing or not the immediately preceding batch

errors.name: PreviousBatchStillPending
errors.msg: previous batch is still pending

errors.name: BatchNotPending
errors.msg: batch is not pending

errors.name: BatchNotDispatched
errors.msg: batch is not dispatched

errors.name: BatchNotSettled
errors.msg: batch is not settled

errors.name: BatchTooYoung
errors.msg: batch is younger than the minimum batch age

errors.name: DerivedAccountMismatch
errors.msg: account does not match its canonical derived address

errors.name: EncryptedValueInvalid
errors.msg: encrypted value account is invalid

errors.name: InvalidFheEvalPlan
errors.msg: invalid FHE eval plan

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: payout already claimed for this join record

errors.name: ShareRateOverflow
errors.msg: share rate does not fit u64

errors.name: BatchIndexOverflow
errors.msg: batch index overflowed

errors.name: ShareBalanceUnderflow
errors.msg: batch share balance decreased across the vault deposit

errors.name: JoinMintVaultMismatch
errors.msg: join confidential mint does not wrap the vault mint this direction requires

errors.name: PayoutMintVaultMismatch
errors.msg: payout confidential mint does not wrap the vault mint this direction requires

errors.name: PayoutBalanceUnderflow
errors.msg: batch payout balance decreased across the vault leg

types.name: Batch
docs: One batch: its own confidential token account (so the revealed total is
exactly this batch's sum), lifecycle status, and the public settle results.

fields.name: batcher
docs: Batcher config this batch belongs to (carries the direction).

fields.name: index
docs: Zero-based index within the batcher.

fields.name: status
docs: Lifecycle status.

fields.name: opened_slot
docs: Slot the batch opened at; dispatch requires `min_batch_age_slots` past.

fields.name: join_count
docs: Number of join calls routed into this batch.

fields.name: authority_bump
docs: Bump of the per-batch authority PDA.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for `(batcher, index)`.

fields.name: burned_total_handle
docs: Born-public handle of the burned batch total (set at dispatch).

fields.name: total_joined
docs: KMS-certified batch join total (set at settle; public by design).

fields.name: payout_received
docs: Payout units the vault leg produced for the batch total (set at settle).

fields.name: payout_rate
docs: Informational rate `payout_received * RATE_SCALE / total_joined`,
saturating at u64::MAX (settle). Claims use exact proportional division
instead — never this field.

types.name: BatchCanceled
docs: Emitted when a zero-total batch is canceled at settle time (nothing to
move through the vault, no rate to freeze — the division never happens).

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: batch
docs: Batch account.

types.name: BatchDirection
docs: Which way through the vault a batcher instance moves value. Direction lives
on the `Batcher` config — one instance per direction, mirroring the EVM's
two batcher deployments — so a pending deposit batch never blocks a redeem
batch, and every batch inherits its batcher's direction.

types.name: BatchDispatched
docs: Emitted when a batch is dispatched: its full encrypted balance was burned
and the born-public burned handle awaits KMS certification.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: batch
docs: Batch account.

fields.name: burned_total_handle
docs: Born-public handle of the burned batch total.

types.name: BatchOpened
docs: Emitted when a new batch opens.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: batcher
docs: Batcher config account.

fields.name: batch
docs: Batch account.

fields.name: index
docs: Zero-based batch index within the batcher.

fields.name: batch_authority
docs: Per-batch authority PDA owning the batch's token accounts.

fields.name: opened_slot
docs: Slot the batch opened at.

types.name: BatchSettled
docs: Emitted when a batch settles: the certified total went through the vault
and the batch's public settle results are frozen. The amounts here are the
batch aggregates, intentionally public.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: batch
docs: Batch account.

fields.name: total_joined
docs: KMS-certified batch join total (public by design).

fields.name: payout_received
docs: Payout units the vault leg produced for the batch total.

fields.name: payout_rate
docs: Informational rate `payout_received * RATE_SCALE / total_joined`,
saturating at u64::MAX. Claims use exact proportional division.

types.name: BatchStatus
docs: Lifecycle of a batch.

types.name: Batcher
docs: Batcher config wiring a join confidential mint, a payout confidential mint,
and one public vault together for one direction.

fields.name: direction
docs: Direction of this batcher instance.

fields.name: join_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint users join batches with. Wraps the vault's underlying
mint for deposit batchers, the vault's share mint for redeem batchers.

fields.name: payout_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint claims pay out in. Wraps the vault's share mint for
deposit batchers, the vault's underlying mint for redeem batchers.

fields.name: vault
docs: Public `demo_vault::Vault` the batcher fronts.

fields.name: min_batch_age_slots
docs: Minimum slots a batch must stay open before dispatch.

fields.name: next_batch_index
docs: Index the next `open_batch` creates.

types.name: BatcherInitialized
docs: Emitted when a batcher config is created.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: batcher
docs: Batcher config account.

fields.name: direction
docs: Direction of this batcher instance.

fields.name: join_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint users join batches with.

fields.name: payout_confidential_mint
docs: Confidential mint claims pay out in.

fields.name: vault
docs: Public vault the batcher fronts.

fields.name: min_batch_age_slots
docs: Minimum slots a batch must stay open before dispatch.

types.name: ConfidentialMint
docs: Confidential mint state for the token PoC.
The total supply's current handle and access lineage live in the
`EncryptedValue` account at `total_supply_encrypted_value`.

fields.name: authority
docs: Admin/authority that created the mint.

fields.name: acl_domain_key
docs: ACL domain key, currently equal to the mint pubkey.

fields.name: compute_signer
docs: Program-controlled compute signer PDA.

fields.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying SPL mint wrapped by this confidential mint.

fields.name: decimals
docs: Decimal precision inherited from the underlying mint.

fields.name: total_supply_encrypted_value
docs: `EncryptedValue` lineage PDA holding the current total-supply handle.

types.name: CoprocessorInputAttestation
docs: A coprocessor input attestation carried inline by a [`FheEvalOperand::VerifiedInput`], re-verified
in-frame (no account, no PDA) — the instruction-local analog of EVM `allowTransient(input, contract)`.

fields.name: input_handle
docs: The verified input handle used as the operand.

fields.name: ct_handles
docs: All ciphertext handles covered by the proof.

fields.name: handle_index
docs: Index of `input_handle` within `ct_handles`.

fields.name: user_address
docs: Attested user identity (bytes32).

fields.name: contract_address
docs: Attested contract identity — the input's ACL domain key (bytes32).

fields.name: contract_chain_id
docs: Gateway-side contract chain id the attestation binds.

fields.name: extra_data
docs: Opaque extra data covered by the attestation.

fields.name: signatures
docs: Coprocessor EIP-712 signatures (65-byte secp256k1).

types.name: JoinRecord
docs: Per-(batch, user) join record. The encrypted amount itself lives in the
batcher-owned `EncryptedValue` lineage at `joined_encrypted_value`
(audience: the user, who can decrypt their pending amount, and the batch
authority, which computes refunds and claims from it).

fields.name: batch
docs: Batch this record belongs to.

fields.name: user
docs: Joining user.

fields.name: joined_encrypted_value
docs: `EncryptedValue` lineage holding the user's accumulated joined amount.

fields.name: claimed
docs: Whether the user's payout was claimed.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for `(batch, user)`.

types.name: JoinedBatch
docs: Emitted when a user joins a batch. The amount stays encrypted; only the
participation is public (by design — see CONFIDENTIAL_VAULTS.md).

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: batch
docs: Batch account.

fields.name: user
docs: Joining user.

fields.name: joined_encrypted_value
docs: `EncryptedValue` lineage holding the user's accumulated joined amount.

fields.name: joined_handle
docs: Current handle of the joined lineage after this join.

types.name: MmrInclusionProof
docs: Anchor-native mirror of `zama_solana_acl::MmrProof` for use as an instruction argument. The
shared ACL crate is deliberately Anchor-free (pure `borsh`) so it cannot derive Anchor IDL
metadata; this local type carries the identical wire shape and converts into the shared proof.
Defined in the host program so CPI callers depend only on the host IDL, never on token types.

fields.name: leaf_index
docs: Index of the proven leaf within the lineage's MMR.

fields.name: siblings
docs: Authentication path from the leaf up to its mountain peak.

types.name: PayoutClaimed
docs: Emitted when a user's confidential payout is claimed from a settled batch.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: batch
docs: Batch account.

fields.name: user
docs: User the payout was transferred to.

fields.name: claim_encrypted_value
docs: `EncryptedValue` lineage holding the claimed payout amount.

types.name: QuitBatch
docs: Emitted when a user quits a pending batch: the exact recorded amount was
transferred back and the joined lineage reset to zero.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: batch
docs: Batch account.

fields.name: user
docs: Quitting user.

types.name: Vault
docs: Public share-mint vault state.
Deliberately minimal: totals are never mirrored here. Total assets are read
live from the vault token account balance and total shares from the share
mint supply, so a permissionless `harvest` (a plain donation transfer) is
accounted for by construction — the donation just increases the token
account balance, and every share-price read picks it up.

fields.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying token mint the vault accepts.

fields.name: share_mint
docs: Share mint issued 1:1 in decimals with the underlying.

fields.name: vault_token_account
docs: Token account holding the vault's underlying assets, owned by the authority PDA.

fields.name: authority_bump
docs: Bump for the vault authority PDA that owns assets and the share mint.
